THE RED MONKEY

Bold and hoppy IPA with tropical fruit and citrus flavors. Resinous hop character balanced by a solid malt backbone. Bitter finish that lingers.

Copper IPA

IPA • 6.5% ABV

Brewery Red Monkey Brewing
Style IPA
ABV 6.5%
IBU 65
Color Copper Orange
Price £5.00

Ingredients

Malts
Pale Malt, Munich Malt, Caramel 40
Hops
Simcoe, Amarillo, Mosaic
Yeast
American Ale Yeast
